title: citrus × aurantiifolia
intro: Citrus × aurantiifolia, also known as the calamansi or Philippine lime, is a small, sour citrus fruit that is widely cultivated in tropical regions for its unique flavor and medicinal properties. It has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of consuming calamansi include improving digestion, boosting the immune system, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Calamansi can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or oil, which can be used as a natural remedy for various health conditions or as a flavoring agent in cooking and beverages.
